findings.location: OCR body — section heading for IPv6 address notation subsection
findings.jp_actual: 0● IPv6のアドレス総数の表記法
findings.jp_expected: IPv6のアドレス総数の表記法
findings.trace: OCR captured a stylized bullet/icon marker as 「0●」 prepended to the subsection heading. This is a garbled rendering of a decorative marker (likely a circled number or icon). The structured output dropped this heading entirely, so the garbled text does not appear in output/pages/page_492.md. No release impact.
findings.recommended_fix: In OCR/cleaning stage, strip non-semantic icon artifacts from section headings. Not release-impacting.
